- set_interface_state Serial0/1/0 on R2 — returned "already enabled" (success).

- Verify management-plane reachability to R2 (SSH/NETCONF) from collector; if unreachable, use OOB/console access.

- If management agent is hung, consider restarting the management agent or rebooting the device (with change windows/approval) or escalate for console intervention.
